sas_snippet: proc univariate data=df_in; var num_var_1 num_var_2 num_var_3;run;
python_translation:
import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; from scipy import stats; df = pd.read_csv("CARS.csv"); df.columns = df.columns.str.lower(); def clean_numeric(col): df[col] = df[col].str.replace(r'[$,]', '', regex=True) if df[col].dtype == 'object' else df[col]; return df[col]; target_vars = ['msrp', 'cylinders', 'horsepower']; [df.__setitem__(col, clean_numeric(col)) for col in target_vars if col in df.columns]; def run_proc_univariate(df, variables):
    for var in variables:
        if var not in df.columns:
            continue
        raw_series = df[var].dropna()
        v = raw_series.astype(float).to_numpy()
        print(f"\n{'='*30}\nVariable: {var.upper()}\n{'='*30}")
        moments = {"N": len(v), "Mean": np.mean(v), "Std Deviation": np.std(v, ddof=1), "Skewness": stats.skew(v, bias=False), "Uncorrected SS": np.sum(v**2), "Coeff Variation": (np.std(v, ddof=1) / np.mean(v)) * 100 if np.mean(v) != 0 else np.nan, "Sum Weights": len(v), "Sum Observations": np.sum(v), "Variance": np.var(v, ddof=1), "Kurtosis": stats.kurtosis(v, bias=False), "Corrected SS": np.sum((v - np.mean(v))**2), "Std Error Mean": stats.sem(v)}
        print("\n[Section 1: Moments]")
        print(pd.DataFrame(moments.items(), columns=['Statistic', 'Value']).set_index('Statistic'))
        basic_stats = {"Mean": np.mean(v), "Median": np.median(v), "Mode": stats.mode(v, keepdims=True)[0][0], "Std Deviation": np.std(v, ddof=1), "Variance": np.var(v, ddof=1), "Range": np.max(v) - np.min(v), "Interquartile Range": np.percentile(v, 75, method='midpoint') - np.percentile(v, 25, method='midpoint')}
        print("\n[Section 2: Basic Statistical Measures]")
        print(pd.DataFrame(basic_stats.items(), columns=['Statistic', 'Value']).set_index('Statistic'))
        t_stat, t_pval = stats.ttest_1samp(v, 0)
        n_pos = np.sum(v > 0)
        n_neg = np.sum(v < 0)
        m = (n_pos - n_neg) / 2
        w_stat, w_pval = stats.wilcoxon(v - 0)
        loc_tests = {"Student's t": [t_stat, t_pval], "Sign": [m, stats.binomtest(n_pos, n_pos + n_neg, 0.5).pvalue if (n_pos + n_neg) > 0 else 1.0], "Signed Rank": [w_stat, w_pval]}
        print("\n[Section 3: Tests for Location]")
        print(pd.DataFrame(loc_tests, index=['Statistic', 'p-Value']).T)
        sw_stat, sw_p = stats.shapiro(v)
        ks_stat, ks_p = stats.kstest(v, 'norm', args=(np.mean(v), np.std(v, ddof=1)))
        cvm = stats.cramervonmises(v, 'norm', args=(np.mean(v), np.std(v, ddof=1)))
        ad = stats.anderson(v, 'norm')
        norm_tests = {"Shapiro-Wilk": [sw_stat, sw_p], "Kolmogorov-Smirnov": [ks_stat, ks_p], "Cramer-von Mises": [cvm.statistic, cvm.pvalue], "Anderson-Darling": [ad.statistic, "N/A"]}
        print("\n[Section 4: Tests for Normality]")
        print(pd.DataFrame(norm_tests, index=['Statistic', 'p-Value']).T)
        q_levels = [100, 99, 95, 90, 75, 50, 25, 10, 5, 1, 0]
        quantiles = {f"{q}%": np.percentile(v, q, method='midpoint') for q in q_levels}
        print("\n[Section 5: Quantiles]")
        print(pd.DataFrame(quantiles.items(), columns=['Quantile', 'Value']).set_index('Quantile'))
        sorted_v = np.sort(v)
        extremes = pd.DataFrame({"Lowest": sorted_v[:5], "Highest": sorted_v[-5:][::-1]})
        print("\n[Section 6: Extreme Observations]")
        print(extremes)
        n_missing = len(df) - len(v)
        missing_pct = (n_missing / len(df)) * 100
        missing_data = {"Missing Count": n_missing, "Percent Missing": f"{missing_pct:.2f}%"}
        print("\n[Section 7: Missing Values]")
        print(pd.DataFrame(missing_data.items(), columns=['Label', 'Value']).set_index('Label'))
run_proc_univariate(df, target_vars)

"); basic_stats = pd.DataFrame({"Location": ["Mean", "Median", "Mode", "Range", "Interquartile Range"], "Value": [mean, num_var_1_data.median(), num_var_1_data.mode().iloc[0], num_var_1_data.max() - num_var_1_data.min(), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 75, method='midpoint') - np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 25, method='midpoint')]}); print("### Basic Statistical Measures ###"); print(basic_stats, "
"); t_stat, t_pval = stats.ttest_1samp(num_var_1_data, 0); sign_stat = (num_var_1_data > 0).sum() - (num_var_1_data < 0).sum(); signed_rank_stat, signed_rank_pval = stats.wilcoxon(num_var_1_data - 0); location_tests = pd.DataFrame({"Test": ["Student's t", "Sign", "Signed Rank"], "Statistic": [t_stat, sign_stat, signed_rank_stat], "p-Value": [t_pval, "N/A", signed_rank_pval]}); print("### Tests for Location ###"); print(location_tests, "
"); shapiro_stat, shapiro_pval = stats.shapiro(num_var_1_data); normality_tests = pd.DataFrame({"Test": ["Shapiro-Wilk"], "Statistic": [shapiro_stat], "p-Value": [shapiro_pval]}); print("### Tests for Normality ###"); print(normality_tests, "
"); quantiles = pd.DataFrame({"Quantile": ["100% Max", "99%", "95%", "90%", "75% Q3", "50% Median", "25% Q1", "10%", "5%", "1%", "0% Min"], "Estimate": [num_var_1_data.max(), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 99, method='midpoint'), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 95, method='midpoint'), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 90, method='midpoint'), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 75, method='midpoint'), num_var_1_data.median(), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 25, method='midpoint'), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 10, method='midpoint'), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 5, method='midpoint'), np.percentile(num_var_1_data, 1, method='midpoint'), num_var_1_data.min()]}); print("### Quantiles ###"); print(quantiles, "
"); extremes = pd.DataFrame({"Lowest Value": num_var_1_data.nsmallest(5).values, "Highest Value": num_var_1_data.nlargest(5).values}); print("### Extreme Observations ###"); print(extremes, "
"); missing_count = df_in['num_var_1'].isna().sum(); missing_pct = (missing_count / len(df_in)) * 100; missing_values = pd.DataFrame({"Missing Value": [missing_count], "Count": [missing_count], "Percent": [f"{missing_pct:.2f}%"]}); print("### Missing Values ###"); print(missing_values, "
"); unique_vals = num_var_1_data.nunique(); if unique_vals <= 20: bins = unique_vals; else: bins = int(np.ceil(np.log2(n) + 1)); plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6)); counts, bin_edges, _ = plt.hist(num_var_1_data, bins=bins, weights=np.ones(n)*100/n, color='skyblue', edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7, label='num_var_1'); bin_width = bin_edges[1] - bin_edges[0]; x = np.linspace(num_var_1_data.min(), num_var_1_data.max(), 100); p = stats.norm.pdf(x, mean, std_dev) * bin_width * 100; plt.plot(x, p, 'r', linewidth=2, label='Normal Curve'); plt.title('Distribution of num_var_1 with Normal Fit'); plt.xlabel('num_var_1'); plt.ylabel('Percent'); plt.legend(); plt.show()

sas_snippet: proc univariate data=df_in;var num_var_1;weight num_var_1;run;
python_translation: import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; from scipy import stats; df_in = pd.read_csv('df_in.csv'); df_in.columns = df_in.columns.str.lower(); if df_in['num_var_1'].dtype == 'object': df_in['num_var_1'] = df_in['num_var_1'].replace(r'[\$,]', '', regex=True).astype(float); df = df_in[['num_var_1']].dropna().copy(); x = df['num_var_1'].values; w = df['num_var_1'].values; n = len(x); sum_w = np.sum(w); mean_w = np.sum(w * x) / sum_w; uss = np.sum(w * (x**2)); css = np.sum(w * (x - mean_w)**2); variance = css / (n - 1); std_dev = np.sqrt(variance); cv = (std_dev / mean_w) * 100 if mean_w != 0 else np.nan; std_error = std_dev / np.sqrt(sum_w); t_stat = mean_w / std_error; skew_num = n * np.sum(w * (x - mean_w)**3); skew_den = (n - 1) * (n - 2) * (std_dev**3); skewness = skew_num / skew_den if skew_den != 0 else np.nan; kurt_term1_num = n * (n + 1) * np.sum(w * (x - mean_w)**4); kurt_term1_den = (n - 1) * (n - 2) * (n - 3) * (std_dev**4); kurt_term2 = (3 * (n - 1)**2) / ((n - 2) * (n - 3)); kurtosis = (kurt_term1_num / kurt_term1_den) - kurt_term2 if kurt_term1_den != 0 else np.nan; mode_df = df.groupby('num_var_1')['num_var_1'].sum().reset_index(name='weight_sum'); max_weight = mode_df['weight_sum'].max(); weighted_mode = mode_df[mode_df['weight_sum'] == max_weight]['num_var_1'].min(); sorted_idx = np.argsort(x); x_sorted = x[sorted_idx]; w_sorted = w[sorted_idx]; cum_w = np.cumsum(w_sorted); prob = (cum_w - 0.5 * w_sorted) / sum_w; quant_levels = [0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 0.90, 0.95, 0.99, 1.0]; quantiles = np.interp(quant_levels, prob, x_sorted); low_extremes = np.sort(x)[:5]; high_extremes = np.sort(x)[-5:][::-1]; sw_stat, sw_p = stats.shapiro(x); missing_count = df_in['num_var_1'].isna().sum(); missing_pct = (missing_count / len(df_in)) * 100; print("Section: Moments"); print(f"{'N':<20} {n:>15.0f} | {'Sum Weights':<20} {sum_w:>15.4f}"); print(f"{'Mean':<20} {mean_w:>15.4f} | {'Sum Observations':<20} {np.sum(x):>15.4f}"); print(f"{'Std Deviation':<20} {std_dev:>15.4f} | {'Variance':<20} {variance:>15.4f}"); print(f"{'Skewness':<20} {skewness:>15.4f} | {'Kurtosis':<20} {kurtosis:>15.4f}"); print(f"{'USS':<20} {uss:>15.4f} | {'CSS':<20} {css:>15.4f}"); print(f"{'CV':<20} {cv:>15.4f} | {'Std Error Mean':<20} {std_error:>15.4f}"); print("-" * 80); print("Section: Basic Statistical Measures"); print(f"Location: Mean={mean_w:.4f}, Median={quantiles[5]:.4f}, Mode={weighted_mode:.4f}"); print(f"Variability: StdDev={std_dev:.4f}, Variance={variance:.4f}, Range={x.max()-x.min():.4f}, IQR={quantiles[6]-quantiles[4]:.4f}"); print("-" * 80); print("Section: Tests for Location: Mu0 = 0"); print(f"t-statistic: {t_stat:.4f}, p-value: {2 * (1 - stats.t.cdf(abs(t_stat), n-1)):.4f}"); print("-" * 80); print("Section: Tests for Normality"); print(f"Shapiro-Wilk W: {sw_stat:.4f}, p-value: {sw_p:.4f}"); print("-" * 80); print("Section: Quantiles"); [print(f"{l:>3}% Quantile: {q:>15.4f}") for l, q in zip([0, 1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 75, 90, 95, 99, 100], quantiles)]; print("-" * 80); print("Section: Extreme Observations"); print(f"Lowest:  {low_extremes}"); print(f"Highest: {high_extremes}"); print("-" * 80); print("Section: Missing Values"); print(f"Missing Count: {missing_count} ({missing_pct:.2f}%)")

sas_snippet: proc freq data=df_in order=freq; tables cat_col_1 * cat_col_2; run;

import pandas as pd; df_in = pd.read_csv("CARS.csv"); ct_freq = pd.crosstab(df_in["Origin"], df_in["Type"], margins=True, margins_name="Total", dropna=True); sorted_rows = ct_freq["Total"].drop("Total").sort_values(ascending=False).index; ct_freq = ct_freq.loc[list(sorted_rows) + ["Total"]]; sorted_cols = ct_freq.loc["Total"].drop("Total").sort_values(ascending=False).index; ct_freq = ct_freq[list(sorted_cols) + ["Total"]]; total_n = ct_freq.loc["Total", "Total"]; ct_pct = (ct_freq / total_n * 100).round(2); ct_row_pct = ct_freq.div(ct_freq["Total"], axis=0).mul(100).round(2); ct_col_pct = ct_freq.div(ct_freq.loc["Total"], axis=1).mul(100).round(2); print("=== Frequency ==="); print(ct_freq.to_string()); print("
=== Percent (of Total) ==="); print(ct_pct.to_string()); print("
=== Row Percent ==="); print(ct_row_pct.to_string()); print("
=== Column Percent ==="); print(ct_col_pct.to_string())

sas_snippet: proc freq data=df_in order=freq; tables cat_col_1 * cat_col_2; run;
python_translation: import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; df_in = pd.read_csv("df_in.csv"); df_in.columns = df_in.columns.str.lower(); ct_freq = pd.crosstab(df_in["cat_col_1"], df_in["cat_col_2"], margins=True, margins_name="Total", dropna=False); ordered_cat_col_1s = ct_freq["Total"].drop("Total").sort_values(ascending=False).index.tolist(); ordered_cat_col_2s = ct_freq.loc["Total"].drop("Total").sort_values(ascending=False).index.tolist(); ct_freq = ct_freq.loc[ordered_cat_col_1s + ["Total"], ordered_cat_col_2s + ["Total"]]; df_cross = ct_freq.stack().reset_index(name="Frequency"); grand_total = ct_freq.loc["Total", "Total"]; df_cross["Percent"] = (df_cross["Frequency"] / grand_total * 100).round(2); def calc_col_pct(row): return "" if row["cat_col_2"] == "Total" else f"{(row['Frequency'] / ct_freq.loc['Total', row['cat_col_2']] * 100):.2f}"; df_cross["Column Percent"] = df_cross.apply(calc_col_pct, axis=1); print("Table of cat_col_1 by cat_col_2\n"); print(df_cross.to_string(index=False))

when coprdi in ('01MPOS', '16P2FL','12CUP1','23VCDP') then 'AUTRES' else 'A DEFINIR' end as TTTT
from t3ecom_met1.v0tr60 A JOIN  t3eesp_esp0.v5TD5I B ON a.coco = b.coco

        case

    left join work.origin_avg as b
        on a.Origin = b.Origin
    order by a.Origin, a.Make, a.Model;
quit;

proc export data=work.case_016_output
    outfile="&output_dir./case_016_output.csv"
